overview.short: Chachai Falls is in Rewa district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.
overview.description: Chachai Falls is in Rewa district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is the 23rd highest waterfall in India.

topPlaces.name: Purwa Falls
topPlaces.description: The Purwa Falls is a waterfall on the Tamsa River in Rewa district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is located in Semariya, a town in Rewa district, near Basavan Mama, a sacred and tourist place.

topPlaces.name: Badraon Tiwariyan
topPlaces.description: Badaraotiwariyan is a village of Sirmor tehsil (Janpad) in Rewa of Madhya Pradesh in India. It is located 33 km north of Rewa, 11 km from Sirmour, and 509 km from Bhopal.

items.note: The Purwa Falls is a waterfall on the Tamsa River in Rewa district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is located in Semariya, a town in Rewa district, near Basavan Mama, a sacred and tourist place.
Badaraotiwariyan is a village of Sirmor tehsil (Janpad) in Rewa of Madhya Pradesh in India. It is located 33 km north of Rewa, 11 km from Sirmour, and 509 km from Bhopal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chachai Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chachai Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chachai Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Prayagraj Airport (Bamrauli) (84 km) and the nearest railway station is Satna Junction (54 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chachai Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chachai Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chachai Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Chachai Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chachai Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Purwa Falls, Badraon Tiwariyan.
